prompt: I have a really long architecture document in Outline called 'Platform Architecture Overview'. I need to read just the section about our database layer. Can you find it and show me that section?

assertions.text: Uses search_documents or get_document_id_from_title to find the document ID
Uses get_document_toc to inspect the document structure before reading
Uses read_document_section with a heading match rather than read_document with no offset/limit
